calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Lai Yee Wong was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Chi Wo Kwong, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Jenny Yau was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Jacky Chiwo Kwong.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
